description: Short donation lines in three buckets: mild, playful, and mean-jokey. Written for quick laughs, not long reads.

mild.label: Mild
phrases: Hi again. If Pylux helps, toss us a tip?
Psst. Enjoying Pylux? If you can, toss a small tip.
No ads, no tracking, just one polite donation ask.
Open source runs on code, coffee, and donations.
Breaking news: generous user spotted near this button.
Your future self says, "Nice, I donated."
Thanks for using Pylux. Even a small tip helps.

playful.label: Playful / absurd
phrases: Breaking news: local gamer funds app, becomes legend.
Update: donation detected. Maintainer morale up 42%.
Scientists confirm donations improve aim. Scientists fled.
This popup is on a side quest for rent money.
Donate now to unlock Legendary Supporter energy.
Hi, I'm here to talk about your car's extended warranty... just kidding. Please donate.
Weather report: 100% chance of good karma after donating.

mean.label: Mean (jokey)
mean.tone: Rude on purpose, still jokes. Use sparingly.
phrases: Donate now. Your future girlfriend loves people who support open source.
If she asks what green flags you have, say: I donate to indie apps.
No girlfriend yet? Start with kindness, then maybe donate for bonus points.
Skip this if you want, but your future girlfriend loves a generous nerd.
